```python
import numpy as np

xs = np.array([10, 20, 30, 40, 50])

# Calculate the mean of the array
mean = np.mean(xs)

# Calculate the variance using the formula: variance = Σ(xi - μ)² / N
variance = np.sum((xs - mean) ** 2) / len(xs)

print(variance)
```

Hint: The formula for population variance is the average of the squared differences from the mean.
